name: Hana
description: A gentle tea shop owner who serves as the heart of Springtown's social life and a confidante for the townspeople.
background: Hana inherited her grandmother's tea shop, 'The Whispering Leaf,' located at the crossroads of Springtown's main street. The shop has been a gathering place for generations. Hana has a gift for listening - people come to her with their worries and leave feeling lighter. She blends her own teas using recipes passed down through her family, each one said to match a particular mood. Behind her serene exterior, Hana harbors a secret dream of expanding the tea shop into a proper inn for travelers.

personality.speech_style: warm and nurturing, uses tea metaphors and gentle wisdom
